---
title: "Create Crypto Payment"
sidebarTitle: "/payments/v2/crypto"
api: "POST https://api-gateway.gates2b.com/payments/v2/crypto"
authMethod: "authorization"
description: "This endpoint creates a crypto payment with automatic fiat currency conversion."
---

<ParamField
  header="Authorization"
  type="string"
  placeholder="Bearer {token}"
  required
>
  The Bearer authentication token is required to access this endpoint.
</ParamField>

<ParamField body="amount" type="number" placeholder="71.4226873" required>
  Payment amount in the specified fiat currency.
</ParamField>

<ParamField body="fiat_currency" type="string" placeholder="BRL" required>
  Fiat currency for conversion (e.g., BRL, USD, EUR).
</ParamField>

<ParamField body="pay_currency" type="string" placeholder="USDTBSC" required>
  Crypto currency used for the payment (e.g., USDTBSC, BTC, ETH).
</ParamField>

<ParamField
  body="customer_name"
  type="string"
  placeholder="Maria Santos"
  required
>
  Customer full name.
</ParamField>

<ParamField
  body="customer_email"
  type="string"
  placeholder="maria@empresa.com"
  required
>
  Customer email.
</ParamField>

<ParamField
  body="external_reference"
  type="string"
  placeholder="INV-2024-001"
  required
>
  External reference for your application.
</ParamField>

<RequestExample>

```bash cURL
curl -X POST "https://api-gateway.gates2b.com/payments/v2/crypto" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer {seu-token}" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "amount": 71.4226873,
    "fiat_currency": "BRL",
    "pay_currency": "USDTBSC",
    "customer_name": "Maria Santos",
    "customer_email": "maria@empresa.com",
    "external_reference": "INV-2024-001",
  }'
```

```javascript
const response = await fetch(
  "https://api-gateway.gates2b.com/payments/v2/crypto",
  {
    method: "POST",
    headers: {
      Authorization: "Bearer {seu-token}",
      "Content-Type": "application/json",
    },
    body: JSON.stringify({
      amount: 71.4226873,
      fiat_currency: "BRL",
      pay_currency: "USDTBSC",
      customer_name: "Maria Santos",
      customer_email: "maria@empresa.com",
      external_reference: "INV-2024-001",
    }),
  },
);

const data = await response.json();
```

```python
import requests

url = "https://api-gateway.gates2b.com/payments/v2/crypto"
headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {seu-token}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json"
}
payload = {
    "amount": 71.4226873,
    "fiat_currency": "BRL",
    "pay_currency": "USDTBSC",
    "customer_name": "Maria Santos",
    "customer_email": "maria@empresa.com",
    "external_reference": "INV-2024-001",
}

response = requests.post(url, headers=headers, json=payload)
```

</RequestExample>

<ResponseExample>

```json Success
{
  "id": "68d2fa97b30181b2d2f13600",
  "id_transaction": "d615bb9b-e935-47c4-ac19-ad046e4b5f1a",
  "status": "WAITING_PAYMENT",
  "payment_id": "6043353044",
  "qr_code": "",
  "pay_address": "0x1CEfB8730786f34af8B10dC4e5B8028F79a63abd?amount=13.82478513",
  "amount": 71.4226873,
  "currency": "BRL",
  "expires_at": "2025-09-24T19:52:55.998Z",
  "redirect_url": null
}
```

```json Error - Invalid data
{
  "error": "validation_error",
  "message": "Dados de entrada inválidos",
  "details": {
    "amount": "Valor deve ser maior que zero",
    "pay_currency": "Moeda de pagamento não suportada"
  }
}
```

```json Example with other values
{
  "id": "7a8b9c0d1e2f3a4b5c6d7e8f",
  "id_transaction": "f9e8d7c6-b5a4-9382-7160-5f4e3d2c1b0a",
  "status": "WAITING_PAYMENT",
  "payment_id": "7890123456",
  "qr_code": "",
  "pay_address": "0x9F8e2A3B4C5D6E7F8A9B0C1D2E3F4A5B6C7D8E9F?amount=25.12345678",
  "amount": 150.75,
  "currency": "USD",
  "expires_at": "2025-10-15T14:30:45.123Z",
  "redirect_url": "https://meusite.com/retorno-pagamento"
}
```

</ResponseExample>
